meta.title: This AI Video Generator Made a Star Wars Movie!
meta.description:
NEW AI Video Generator makes AI movies with 1 prompt
Invideo AI 👉 https://bit.ly/3FhYAuM

My chatgpt prompt bot: https://bit.ly/416137D

In this video I used AI to  rewrite Star Wars with a new ai video generator. This ai video generator creates all the scenes, writes the script and edits the entire video into a full movie. All of this is done simply by writing a prompt. The tool I am using for this is Invideo AI 3.0 which is the latest ai video generator model of invideo ai. 

The entire star wars video was generated and edited with Invideo AI. 

👉My Ai Toolkit - dankieft.carrd.co

00:12 AI Star Wars example
01:40 How to generate your video
04:31 How to edit your generated video
07:35 Custom ChatGPT prompt bot for invideo AI
